title: Building a Conversational Agent for Education
scenario: Create a conversational agent that can provide educational resources and support to students. The agent should be able to understand user questions and provide clear and concise answers. Ensure the agent's responses are concise and within a 50-word limit.

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the conversational agent understand user questions?
Are the agent's responses clear and concise?
Does the prompt adhere to the constraint of being under 50 words?
